plumbing

Denver's Trusted Plumbing Experts

Fast, reliable plumbing services for Denver homes. Serving Aurora to Highlands Ranch with same-day emergency repairs.

Get Started Today

Serving Denver, CO and surrounding areas

12+ Years of
Excellence

Trusted by homeowners across Denver

+ Years in Business
Projects Completed
Client Satisfaction
Team Members

What We Do

Professional services from Summit Plumbing Solutions — quality you can count on.

Emergency Plumbing

24/7 crisis response for burst pipes, overflowing toilets, and sudden leaks.

Water Heater Installation

Right-sized tank and tankless systems for Denver's hard water conditions.

Drain Cleaning

Advanced hydro-jetting and snaking for Denver's problematic drains.

Pipe Repair

Trenchless solutions and precision fixes for Denver's aging pipes.

Sewer Line Replacement

Modern trenchless techniques for failing sewer lines across Denver.

Bathroom Repiping

Complete water line overhauls for Denver bathroom remodels and leaks.

What Our Clients Say

When our Park Hill bungalow's pipes froze during the January polar vortex, Summit had a technician here in 35 minutes. He thawed the lines safely and identified several other vulnerable spots we've since addressed. Couldn't be more grateful!

Sarah K. Emergency Plumbing

The team installed a high-efficiency tankless unit in our Highlands Ranch home perfectly. They adjusted the gas pressure for altitude and installed a water softener to protect the system - all at a better price than the big box stores quoted.

James T. Water Heater Installation

After three other companies failed to fully clear our RiNo loft's stubborn kitchen drain, Summit's hydro-jetting did the trick. The technician showed me the camera footage of the grease buildup and explained how to prevent future issues.

Ming L. Drain Cleaning

They repaired multiple pinhole leaks in our Arvada ranch's copper pipes without tearing up walls. The epoxy lining solution has held perfectly through two freeze cycles so far. Professional from estimate to cleanup.

Elena R. Pipe Repair

Summit replaced our collapsed sewer line under the driveway in Wash Park using trenchless methods - saved our mature elm tree and beautiful paver driveway. The crew was meticulous and left the site spotless.

David P. Sewer Line Replacement

During our Capitol Hill bathroom remodel, they expertly replaced the galvanized pipes while preserving the original tilework we wanted to keep. The new PEX system provides much better pressure than our 1920s plumbing ever did.

Natalie B. Bathroom Repiping

Honest assessment of our options for a Lakewood split-level. They recommended a hybrid heat pump model that's cut our energy bills significantly, and the installation was completed in one day despite tricky access.

Carlos M. Water Heater Installation

2 AM basement flood in Aurora during a snowstorm - Summit's emergency team arrived faster than promised, stopped the leak, and helped coordinate water damage mitigation. Their compassion during a stressful situation meant everything.

Priya S. Emergency Plumbing

When our Park Hill bungalow's pipes froze during the January polar vortex, Summit had a technician here in 35 minutes. He thawed the lines safely and identified several other vulnerable spots we've since addressed. Couldn't be more grateful!

Sarah K. Emergency Plumbing

The team installed a high-efficiency tankless unit in our Highlands Ranch home perfectly. They adjusted the gas pressure for altitude and installed a water softener to protect the system - all at a better price than the big box stores quoted.

James T. Water Heater Installation

After three other companies failed to fully clear our RiNo loft's stubborn kitchen drain, Summit's hydro-jetting did the trick. The technician showed me the camera footage of the grease buildup and explained how to prevent future issues.

Ming L. Drain Cleaning

They repaired multiple pinhole leaks in our Arvada ranch's copper pipes without tearing up walls. The epoxy lining solution has held perfectly through two freeze cycles so far. Professional from estimate to cleanup.

Elena R. Pipe Repair

Summit replaced our collapsed sewer line under the driveway in Wash Park using trenchless methods - saved our mature elm tree and beautiful paver driveway. The crew was meticulous and left the site spotless.

David P. Sewer Line Replacement

During our Capitol Hill bathroom remodel, they expertly replaced the galvanized pipes while preserving the original tilework we wanted to keep. The new PEX system provides much better pressure than our 1920s plumbing ever did.

Natalie B. Bathroom Repiping

Honest assessment of our options for a Lakewood split-level. They recommended a hybrid heat pump model that's cut our energy bills significantly, and the installation was completed in one day despite tricky access.

Carlos M. Water Heater Installation

2 AM basement flood in Aurora during a snowstorm - Summit's emergency team arrived faster than promised, stopped the leak, and helped coordinate water damage mitigation. Their compassion during a stressful situation meant everything.

Priya S. Emergency Plumbing

Need a plumber you can trust?

Call (303) 555-0142 for same-day service across the Denver metro.

Call (303) 555-0142 Request a Quote

Your Local Plumbing Partner

Founded in 2012, Summit Plumbing Solutions has been keeping Denver homes flowing smoothly through harsh winters and rapid growth. What began as a two-person operation now serves thousands of satisfied customers across the metro area.

We believe plumbing should be straightforward - honest assessments, clear pricing, and work that lasts through Colorado's freeze-thaw cycles. Our technicians train continuously on the latest techniques for older Denver homes.

From sponsoring youth sports in Aurora to volunteering with Habitat for Humanity in Lakewood, we're committed to strengthening the communities we serve.

12+ Years Experience
800+ Projects Done
97% Satisfaction

Why Choose Summit Plumbing Solutions

24/7 Emergency Response

When pipes burst at 2 AM during a Denver snowstorm, we're there - fully stocked trucks ready to handle any crisis.

Local Climate Specialists

We know how Colorado's extreme temperature swings affect pipes differently than coastal climates.

Historic Home Experts

From Capitol Hill Victorians to mid-century Arvada ranches, we understand Denver's diverse housing stock.

Upfront Pricing

No surprises - we provide clear estimates before turning a wrench, with options for every budget.
